name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 4/24/2017. |

**FEATURED**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff2f3fafa154a661ec49081efa10ddec5f8f1ae7178ff2e133fbd17c05c87fd8a72b4a4f5260a801d13b213c86fd9e2583)

**WHITE HOUSE MEMO**
Today, President Donald J. Trump will congratulate NASA astronaut Peggy Whitson for breaking the record for most time in space of any American. President Trump will host a videoconference call from the Oval office with Dr. Whitson, who is currently aboard the International Space Station. The President is calling on all Americans to dream big, and bold, and daring things for our country. Putting American footprints on distant worlds is not too big a dream!

**MORNING:**
* **10:00AM:** President Trump has a video conference with NASA astronauts aboard the International Space Station – **[Watch LIVE](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffe0469084ad218b3d8aebb1f37015ad71eb2e55dc97f1b1346b511a3510b7ec7bc8f908d160d17853e91454dce3f639ea)**
* **11:30AM:** President Trump has a working lunch with ambassadors of countries on the United Nations Security Council

**AFTERNOON:**
* **2:30PM:** President Trump signs a proclamation on Holocaust Remembrance
* **3:00PM:** President Trump hosts a credential ceremony for newly appointed ambassadors to Washington, D.C.
* **4:30PM:** President Trump meets with Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Joseph Dunford
* **5:30PM:** President Trump participates in a reception with conservative media
* **6:30PM:** President Trump has dinner with Senator John McCain, Mrs. Cindy McCain, and Senator Lindsey Graham

**OVAL OFFICE HIGHLIGHTS**
President Trump signs three financial services presidential actions.
[Read Remarks](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffb4794527d9ebf16e39b92b873881472e7a1750d27b2148fecec13090c2aaf97dc50d2374f7b362beedb9919050276534)
[Presidential Memorandum on Financial Stability Oversight Council](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff482fe4bfd8fa4e8852f3e19428e0ec74ae89cb1b935f4735940447208fd5eb459f15e4676f595bf50d867b5b3592016f)
[Presidential Memorandum on Orderly Liquidation Authority](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffc6691be0fc61cc6783ecdf99f5c8390b18cb070094fd232251bd3903a4770b0425022480dfbaa39f757d1acb2c284a37)
[Executive Order on Identifying and Reducing Tax Regulatory Burdens](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffe158d5d2abe37a4a129a787c29492bc690efafb4307833bb53f8822b07221b9b787e0f57bf725ac10c1e1170538a26b7)
[ ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff5ade871ae9aeb190746384a79b088e7f7aed85d9be95b89e1d74ac1cd8f4c3a18b90e848e09a07a76c7caf85961b2271)

**WHITE HOUSE UPDATES**
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff6c9f5d614545ab7eb049117cef3dac6aefef76d642ee3a4fcab01c5bd491e31a444970dde50cb2a3b644a855bd0cff95)
[Retweet](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff0040b8e8ef969f6b6e2ccc6d3ad76ad5d2c0382ba5885ee4d2ed11605b86bd46ee7f54cf6c2032864b7578e4242f250c)

Check out a 360-degree view of the Green Room
[](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff6a5500dd276b89d563a8f6025e472091dc3ff2f22ec280ac2e142c686deba392a8a36b0d2ebb1b730b5320009599ec3e)

**NEWS FROM VICE PRESIDENT PENCE'S ASIA-PACIFIC TOUR**
Vice President Pence meets with Indonesian business leaders and departs for Australia.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff49711fee353b5c6176156ad32809a7de95cc5e23b5cf6901fbe416df4a98e4b81bb0ba520a1df9ad5871d7dd57d24978)

Vice President Mike Pence arrives in Australia to meet with government and business leaders.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff980eb705f3264222ae5660a5f0cb2d6bd133f0e11caf0ed4b0a8e81f77bee1b08f41d4f01042aaa2fd8239f70dd7a082)

Vice President Pence makes remarks to the United States - Australian Business Community.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffe18e1d726a9a173ad25e06e20df76b4ce1b3b0436a6b2046eebc8e97bd7a93f56e796ffbc66b14e5064dc987705d4a49)

Vice President Pence and Australian Prime Minister Malcolm Turnball hold a joint press conference.
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffe8f51a7f018d3742294f34a1d5cb2a351a7d900f7dfa19fb1bf96cd20caf7cf5804eed0da2bffbb36bce8d7c86d531df)

**PRESS ROOM**
Read the press gaggle with Sean Spicer [here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff6a92d3fa900e70d1d9bdcbfa04dcad4cf1331150c0888fbd20cbac0ff4222299b61ce1ed737926f1181264a2f8952a8e)

Today's press briefing will take place at 1:30PM ET in the White House Briefing Room with Press Secretary Sean Spicer. [Watch it LIVE here.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffc57cda8cbf62d8505c5212cb9e3c53455f4a8e5d10f0ddce035d9743785ad8b3e900fbbad94b1bfbb56879f261a12476)

**NEWS REPORTS**
* _NBC News:_ "Charity Worker Detained in Egypt for 3 Years Credits Trump for Release"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff0e52c974ad1532f334f5ce83a7641a8650f68eda20d9078ac321597409014d69a1bb0e0c2e13e3115f1ef56df6d4a507)
* _Fox Business:_ "Trump Order Gives Mnuchin Green Light to Take 'First Step' on Tax Reform"
[Read More](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff74848ff517c01570e1c7db9089e583fe1429152377eac35118e5cbde204ec7a6fa082519dd8b0cf2aa73143d13ed1c0b)

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfffd84eeb5a2924c38b6a30eea6f317f2301d3a7a72b8e1fcdf928eec260c0201b72c49a0caff058c555aa467424910dee7) [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=811621a55785dfff8d1b0f3d7d4eac17fce013a14675617bb405ae232be76d64adc5b6748bf28480e0fda4e7e365441b7ca4619bf48e09cd)[Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d49a58444d9b723f4dbfa693c5f16865d38479b38b7d236d6c02a3ca802555ad02fd4e2c4cc409959106cff35ce4d3ee19)

name: Keith Ellison
subject: I'm fired up
body:
Say you're committed
---
**Add your name and say you're in to elect more Democrats:

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd")**
Friend --

Last week, we asked you to help us reach a big goal: $100,000 for Jon Ossoff's campaign to kick off the runoff election.

I am proud to report that we didn't just hit our mark -- we flew right past it! **Grassroots supporters like you pitched in more than $125,000 for Jon's campaign.**

This is big news for Jon -- who is fighting to win a district that has gone Republican for 38 consecutive years. Thanks to you, he's got a big head start to organize and win in Georgia's 6th congressional district.

We still have a lot more work to do to get Jon over the finish line, but make no mistake: hitting this goal is proof of what Democrats can achieve when we rally together from the grassroots up.

**I'm fired up and ready for whatever it takes to help Jon and Democrats in every state win this year and in 2018. If you are too, then add your name right now to say you're ready to fight and win:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd")**
Thanks,

Keith

Keith Ellison
Deputy Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c857/4067b0a/2f5d9062f/7e75fe73/2983828901/VEsF/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c857/4067b0a/2f5d9062f/7e75fe70/2983828901/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c857/4067b0a/2f5d9062f/7e75fe71/2983828901/VEsD/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c857/4067b0a/2f5d9062f/7e75fe7e/2983828901/VEsA/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_ke_nd&source=em_20170424_ke_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Team Maggie
subject: FWD: IMPORTANT: Help elect Jon Ossoff >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb91/3563502092/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb91/3563502092/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Did you see this, everyone?
Donald Trump is committed to making sure that Jon Ossoff doesn't win Georgia's special election. In fact, he has even said that he'll head down there to campaign against him himself.
Team, we need Jon's voice in Congress. He's committed to protecting Planned Parenthood and strengthening our security, and he won't cave in to corporate special interests. But first, he needs our help.
**This seat has been red for 38 years so if Jon is going to pull out a victory, he needs all of the support we can give him.[Please, donate $3 or more now so that we can pull out the first victory of the Trump era and flip this seat to Democratic control.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb92/3563502092/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for stepping up -- the whole country is counting on you.
Team Maggie
_\-----------Original Message-----------_
On Friday, April 22, 2017 at 3:46 PM, Team Maggie
<info@maggiehassan.com> wrote:
Did you know that Georgia's sixth congressional district has been red for _38 years_?
**But now, for the first time in nearly four decades, we have a real chance to flip this seat to Democratic control. We can elect Jon Ossoff.**
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb92/3563502092/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Jon is committed to standing with Planned Parenthood, ensuring that the minimum wage is a livable wage, and protecting our national security and destroying ISIS.
But with 38 years of conservative tradition working against him and Trump talking about heading to Georgia to campaign for his opponent, Jon needs all of the help we can muster:
[**Please, donate $3 or more -- every dollar you can spare -- to help elect Jon Ossoff and score a critically important victory for Democrats.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb92/3563502092/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan._
**[Click to donate $3.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb93/3563502092/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UVNCOWZRPT0iOiIzIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=3")**
**[Click to donate $25.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb9c/3563502092/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UWlCOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")**
**[Click to donate $50.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb9d/3563502092/VEsO/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFVRnljbUY1UXlCOWZRPT0iOiI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")**
**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb92/3563502092/VEsP/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**
Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to keep this seat, and Trump himself is invested in ensuring that one of his supporters wins.
But Jon's a fighter, team, and he shattered expectations in his primary earlier this week. With his commitment to protecting access to health care and reproductive rights, he is exactly the person Georgia needs in Congress.
[**Everything is on the line here, team, and we really can't afford for Jon to lose. Please, donate $3 or more now. Anything you can give makes a difference.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd75/2a380d31/1584c4ee/fefb92/3563502092/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoibWg0am8iLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE3MDQyM19Pc3NvZmZSdW5PZmYyLWtpY2tfYWxsIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mh4jo?refcode=e20170423_OssoffRunOff2-kick_all&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
Thanks for being part of the fight,
Team Maggie

He's committed to protecting Planned Parenthood and strengthening our security, and he won't cave in to corporate special interests. But first, he needs our help. This seat has been red for 38 years so if Jon is going to pull out a victory, he needs all of the support we can give him. "" Thanks for stepping up -- the whole country is counting on you. Team Maggie \-----------Original Message----------- On Friday, April 22, 2017 at 3:46 PM, Team Maggie <info@maggiehassan.com> wrote: Did you know that Georgia's sixth congressional district has been red for 38 years? But now, for the first time in nearly four decades, we have a real chance to flip this seat to Democratic control. We can elect Jon Ossoff. "" Jon is committed to standing with Planned Parenthood, ensuring that the minimum wage is a livable wage, and protecting our national security and destroying ISIS. But with 38 years of conservative tradition working against him and Trump talking about heading to Georgia to campaign for his opponent, Jon needs all of the help we can muster: "" If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will automatically be split between Jon Ossoff and Maggie Hassan. "" "" "" "" Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to keep this seat, and Trump himself is invested in ensuring that one of his supporters wins. But Jon's a fighter, team, and he shattered expectations in his primary earlier this week. With his commitment to protecting access to health care and reproductive rights, he is exactly the person Georgia needs in Congress. "" Thanks for being part of the fight, Team Maggie ""

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Donald=20J=2E=20Trump?=
subject: more money in your pocket
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Can I get your opinion on this? |

Friend, Enough is enough. Too few Americans are working, we’ve lost jobs overseas, and middle-class families across the country are struggling to make ends meet. Simplifying our tax code will boost consumer spending, encourage savings and investment, and MAXIMIZE our economic growth. Let’s get it done right. Friend, we need a BOLD and ACHIEVABLE plan when it comes to tax reform. It’s time to let families across the country keep more of their income in their pockets. I’d like to know your thoughts on this, it’s important. Please take a moment to share your input on our country’s financial future by taking my Official Tax Reform Survey today. I’d like to focus on... Providing tax relief for middle-class Americans Simplifying the tax code and reducing filing complications GROWING THE AMERICAN ECONOMY!
...all while not increasing our already enormous debt and deficit. It’s time to address one of the country’s biggest issues, Friend, and I’d really appreciate your input. Please, take just 5 minutes and fill out my Official Tax Reform Survey today. Thank you, Donald J. Trump President of the United States
SHARE YOUR INPUT

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: 100 days of resistance
body:
Help us keep fighting
---
**Donald Trump will mark 100 days in office this week -- and we'll celebrate 100 days of resistance. Help us keep fighting by becoming a Founding Donor to our 100 Day Resistance Fund:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eae3/634889972/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/100-Day-Resistance-Fund-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")****
Friend --

He might be trying to hide it now, but Donald Trump made a whole lot of promises about what he'd do in his first 100 days in office. He promised he'd repeal the Affordable Care Act, undo President Obama's executive order that created DACA, start building a wall that Mexico would pay for, and ban Muslims from entering the country.

But because of folks like you who marched, showed up at airports, called your members of Congress, and chipped in to support Democratic candidates from Georgia to Alaska, Trump doesn't have much to show for his first 100 days. With incredible resolve, we resisted -- not just against one thing, but everything this administration has thrown at us.

So when Donald Trump marks 100 days in office on Saturday, I hope you take a minute to celebrate a historic 100 days of resistance -- because then it'll be right back to work for the next hundred days and beyond.

Let's make sure we show the same level of commitment and fortitude that we have had in Trump's first 100 days, every day until we can get him and the Republicans who are enabling him out of office.

Pitch in now to help elect Democrats and be a Founding Donor to our 100 Day Resistance Fund:

**If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eae1/634889972/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100-day-resistance-fund?express_lane=true&amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaee/634889972/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100-day-resistance-fund?express_lane=true&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaef/634889972/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100-day-resistance-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaec/634889972/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100-day-resistance-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
[QUICK DONATE: $200](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaed/634889972/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/100-day-resistance-fund?express_lane=true&amount=200&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+QUICK+DONATE+200&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
[Or donate another amount.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaea/634889972/VEsO/ "https://my.democrats.org/100-Day-Resistance-Fund-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1")
** Thanks,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaf5/634889972/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaf2/634889972/VEsHAw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaf3/634889972/VEsHAg/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c850/4067b0a/2f5c93edf/7e75eaf0/634889972/VEsHDQ/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=18+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&source=em_20170424_tp_v2s1&refcode=em_20170424_tp_v2s1"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Joe Donnelly
subject: The numbers don't add up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
|
---
[](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2667/7377f838/360f55f7/51fb5f42/4064614613/VEsH/ "http://www.joeforindiana.com/")

| | Peter,

In a democracy, voters are supposed to choose their representatives. But Republicans across the country have used unfair gerrymandering to rig the system and choose their voters instead.

Packing voters into districts based on their party or race (an illegal and particularly discriminatory type of gerrymandering) has led to extreme legislators in the House of Representatives and bills that hurt working families -- like the proposal to rip away health coverage from 24 million people that failed last month.

**Peter, I believe we must return to fair elections where voters pick their representatives.[Please join me and tens of thousands of people across the country in demanding an end to gerrymandered districts.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2667/7377f838/360f55f7/51fb5cbd/4064614613/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fjd-gerrymandering%3Frefcode%3D20170424%26amount%3D15")**

The effects of Republican gerrymandering can be felt right here in Indiana, where just this year lawmakers punted on a bipartisan plan to take the politics out of redistricting. Even after a full committee hearing that was attended by hundreds of Hoosiers, the bill was not granted an up or down vote!

**This shouldn 't be a partisan issue, but once again Republicans have rigged the system. We _all_ need to fight for fairer maps.**

**[Add your name to stand with me and demand an end to unfair gerrymandering.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2667/7377f838/360f55f7/51fb5cbd/4064614613/VEsF/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/endgerrymandering/?code=Donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fcontribute%2Fpage%2Fjd-gerrymandering%3Frefcode%3D20170424%26amount%3D15")**

Thank you,
Joe | [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2667/7377f838/360f55f7/51fb5cbc/4064614613/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jd-donate?refcode=20170424db&amount=25")
---

|
---

P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206
Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
[Unsubscribe](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2667/7377f838/360f55f7/51fb5cbf/4064614613/VEsD/ "http://action.joeforindiana.com/unsubscribe")
